profile.name: ComfyUI_IPAdapter_plus

intro.title: ComfyUI IPAdapter plus
intro.desc: The IPAdapter are very powerful models for image-to-image conditioning. The subject or even just the style of the reference image(s) can be easily transferred to a generation. Think of it as a 1-image lora.

install_hints: Download or git clone this repository inside `ComfyUI/custom_nodes/` directory or use the Manager. IPAdapter always requires the latest vers

detalle.name: ComfyUI_IPAdapter_plus
detalle.desc: The IPAdapter are very powerful models for image-to-image conditioning. The subject or even just the style of the reference image(s) can be easily transferred to a generation. Think of it as a 1-image lora.
detalle.avoid_if: el caso no requiere generación multimedia o ya usas alternativas dedicadas
